name: harness-prep
description: Prepare Harness requirements, gates, config, and run workflows from natural-language tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Turn requests into Harness specs, contracts, config, and run guidance.
interface.longDescription: Harness Prep helps an AI agent initialize a Harness project, interview the user for missing requirements, write specs and task lists, draft gate contracts and harness.config.json, and guide later Harness run observation and review decisions.
defaultPrompt: Use $harness-prep to prepare this repo for a Harness run.
Use $harness-prep to inspect my Harness run status.
Use $harness-prep to turn this requirement into gates.
